Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looking at the log each case starts with Receive Application RA Then Validate Form VF follows After that Assess Eligibility AE happens

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In case 1 and 3 after AE there is a Request Missing Info RMI then another VF and then Approval Decision AD In case 2 after AE it goes straight to AD

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So RMI and the subsequent VF are optional and can repeat

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the main flow seems to be RA to VF to AE to loop RMI to VF then AD to SC to AC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop operator is defined as A followed by a choice to exit or do B then A again

Name: Validation - IND
Text: the loop part maybe we can model the RMI and VF as a sequence inside a loop

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait in case 3 the log shows RMI then RMI again then VF So the sequence is RMI RMI VF That complicates things

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: perhaps the loop is just RMI and after the loop VF is executed once

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In case 1 AE to RMI to VF to AD In case 3 AE to RMI to RMI to VF to AD That would fit

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the structure after AE is XOR between directly go to AD or do the loop of RMIs then VF then AD

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The main sequence is RA to VF to AE to XOR between AD and Loop RMI then VF then AD then SC then AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 matches Case 2 matches Case 3 matches

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus this process tree should balance fitness covers all traces precision does not allow extra behaviors and simplicity
